problem id: 512dd86d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  01010000 -> 00000010
  00011001 -> 00000000
  00101001 -> 00000001
  10001011 -> 00000000
  11100010 -> 00000100
  11011001 -> 00000010
  11111000 -> 00000111
  11010100 -> 00000010

query: 01101110
predicted answer: 00000001
